RMU_NARRATOR.Title: RMU Combat Narrator
RMU_NARRATOR.Wizard.Hints.Roster: Review and edit the physical descriptions of the combatants to ensure visual consistency in the generated images.
RMU_NARRATOR.Wizard.Hints.PromptStyle: Determines how the final LLM prompt is formatted for your specific tools.
RMU_NARRATOR.Wizard.Hints.PageTarget: How many comic pages the LLM should attempt to condense this combat into.
RMU_NARRATOR.Wizard.Hints.CampaignContex: This persistent world context prevents the AI from hallucinating the wrong environment.
RMU_NARRATOR.Wizard.Placeholders.Campaig: e.g. Dark, gritty, mud-soaked clearing within a dense forest. The party is exhausted and fighting for their lives.
RMU_NARRATOR.Wizard.Empty.Roster: No combatants found in the roster.
RMU_NARRATOR.Wizard.Notifications.LimitR: Highlight limit reached for your target page count. Deselect an event before adding another.
RMU_NARRATOR.Wizard.Hints.Export: Your curated director's script is compiled below in Dense Notation.
RMU_NARRATOR.Wizard.Notifications.CopyFa: Failed to copy to clipboard. See console for details.
RMU_NARRATOR.Wizard.Hints.ArtStyle: The visual aesthetic applied to the generated image prompts.
RMU_NARRATOR.Dialogs.SaveLogPrompt: Combat has ended. Would you like to save the RMU Combat Narrator event log to a Journal Entry so you can generate a script or images later?
RMU_NARRATOR.Wizard.Hints.LogSelection: Load a previously saved combat encounter from your Journal to generate a script.
RMU_NARRATOR.Dialogs.JournalPageText: This is a raw data log for the RMU Combat Narrator. Please open the Narrator Wizard from the Combat Tracker to view, curate, and compile this script.
